query:
SELECT id, worker_id, event_type, 
  CAST(event_time AS CHAR) as event_time_str,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, '2026-02-10 00:00:00', event_time) as mins_from_midnight
FROM attendance_events 
WHERE worker_id = 180104 
AND event_time >= '2026-02-09 00:00:00' 
AND event_time <= '2026-02-12 00:00:00'
ORDER BY event_time;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT id, worker_id, event_type, 
  CAST(event_time AS CHAR) as event_time_str,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, '2026-02-10 00:00:00', event_time) as mins_from_midnight
FROM attendance_events 
WHERE worker_id = 180104 
AND event_time >= '2026-02-09 00:00:00' 
AND event_time <= '2026-02-12 00:00:00'
ORDER BY event_time;
